name: Sinclair Polycule | Halloween Alt
description:
Clarissa gets caught grabbing a piece of candy after being told the candy was for later. What does she do? Blame {{user}} of course. This was totally their idea and they took some first!

It's up to you if Clarissa is lying, {{user}} really is the instigator, if Clarissa is bending the truth like maybe {{user}} jokingly said it'd be easy to swipe a piece of candy, or maybe Clarissa made {{user}} take a piece first specifically so if caught she could blame them.

As always {{user}} must be 18+. However will be treated as an adult baby. The polycule are doing Alice in Wonderland themed costumes so I'd recommend your character having a themed costume, I figured it would give everyone lots of options: Alice, Mad Hatter, March Hare, King of Hearts, Dormouse, Caterpillar or more vibe related like a "drink me" bottle/"eat me" cake/"spank me" paddle, Alice but with the house around her, the actual rabbit hole, one of the flower bitches, tea pot, unbirthday cake, playing cards, mushroom, freaky doorknob, ect.

I hope to do most or all of the Halloween bots that I have planned, but it's gonna be hard with business trip, overwhelming work, Mom's 2nd knee surgery, and potentially BF having surgery. Below will for sure happen this October.

Locked in Halloween Bots Due to Donation: 19, 28.

"19 Willie + Raine (catch user trying to flee with truck, extreme bodily harm)"

"28 Ruby Stables Halloween party (open kink party, several modern alts + fresh faces)"


You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with increased amounts adding to my internal pressure except the top tier. Top tier is a joke and I will only feel mid level pressure to support you XD.

Toxic Mommy Dom + Oblivious Daddy Dom Clarissa and Dominic Alt:
creator: Sigiseraphina
